title: Trump's Gaza committee remains an empty shell paralyzed by Israel
subhed: Created four months ago as part of Donald Trump's peace plan, the entity is supposed to manage the coastal territory in place of Hamas. But Israel is preventing its members from entering, leaving them stranded in their offices in Cairo.

Morocco faces over 40,000 job losses after France bans telemarketing calls
subhed: A law passed in France bans all prospecting calls without the customer's explicit consent starting August 11. The move endangers tens of thousands of employees in Moroccan call centers, which are heavily dependent on the French market.

title: How France's early heatwave is affecting plants and wildlife
subhed: Birds that nest under rooftops, such as swifts and swallows, are particularly at risk during heatwaves. This unprecedented spell is taking place right in the middle of the nesting season, but it is not accompanied by drought conditions.

title: Second seed Rybakina dumped out of French Open by Starodubtseva
subhed: It is Australian Open champion Elena Rybakina's earliest exit from any WTA tournament since the 2025 Miami Open.

title: At Versailles, Louis XVI's private chamber is recreated after 40 years of twists and turns
subhed: Reconstructed from a single fabric sample and written archives, the recreation of the room and bed where the king slept alone went through its share of extraordinary episodes before finally coming to fruition.

title: The network of US pilots helping women seek abortion care
subhed: Responding to increasingly strict anti-abortion laws in Texas, a non-profit organization offers free flights to neighboring states. The group also assists individuals seeking gender-affirming care.

title: 'It was 30°C in the classrooms this afternoon': France experiences its hottest day in May on record
subhed: Temperatures soared on Tuesday, reaching between 33 and 36°C across much of France, especially in the West, which was 10 to 15°C above seasonal norms. These are midsummer temperatures, even though summer has not yet begun.
